This catalog maps GitClaw's node surface inspired by OpenClaw paired nodes and Hermes worker/delegation boundaries: it exposes commands, layers, and gates while keeping node policy/spec bodies, issue/comment bodies, prompts, tool outputs, credentials, channel payloads, worker payloads, and session bodies out of the report.

- command=`verify` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /nodes verify` local_command=`gitclaw nodes verify` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`policy-spec-validation` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`risk` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /nodes risk` local_command=`gitclaw nodes risk` execution=`risk-audit` gate=`no-remote-exec-boundary` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`

### Node Layers

- layer=`wake` store=`issues/schedule/workflow_dispatch` source=`github-native-events` gate=`github-native-wake-paths` count=`3` raw_bodies_included=`false`

- layer=`approval` store=`node spec requires_approval` source=`repo-reviewed-frontmatter` gate=`pairing-exec-side-effect-approval` count=`1` raw_bodies_included=`false`
- layer=`remote-exec` store=`unsupported in v1` source=`explicit-negative-capability` gate=`disabled-no-node-host-v1` count=`0` raw_bodies_included=`false`

### Catalog Gates
